items.title: GS Equity Income Fund: Q3 2025 Witnesses Fundamental Strength And Expansive Margin Opportunities
items.description: GS Equity Income Fund underperformed in Q3. Discover key contributors like Oracle & J&J, and detractors Kenvue & Honeywell. Click here to read the full report.

items.title: Cancer Study Buoys These Small Biotechs
items.description: Terns Pharmaceuticals shares jumped as much as 50% on news that cancer cell counts fell over 99% in nearly three-fourths of leukemia patients treated with the firm’s once-daily pill.

items.title: Jamie Dimon taps Jeff Bezos, Michael Dell, and Ford CEO Jim Farley to advise JPMorgan’s $1.5 trillion national security initiative
items.description: Former military commanders, politicians, and one of Warren Buffett’s top stock pickers are also joining the advisory group.

items.title: Pharma ETFs to Gain From Landmark UK-US Zero-Tariff Deal
items.description: Pharma ETFs like IHE are poised to surge as the UK-US zero-tariff deal raises UK drug prices and strengthens major U.S. players' outlook.

items.title: Reuters Issues Correction: U.S. FDA Says "Doing A Thorough Investigation, Across Multiple Age Groups, Of Deaths Potentially Related To Covid Vaccines"
